creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 209852
Screenshot: after quitting JabRef, java continued to run

In this case I started jabref from the command line, then keyed Control-Q to quit. 

JabRef was no longer in Task Manager (KDE Plasma 5), java continued to run …

----
